texto: The next three hours went by in a mind-numbing haze. By the time the cab pulled up to the airport terminal, she was pissed. Not at him though. She wanted to be-she'd fallen back in love with him, and he couldn't even stick around to have a waffle and say good-bye?-but she couldn't.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Nicolette Day que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “The next three hours went by in a mind-numbing haze. By the time the cab pulled up to the airport…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, anger, love, com foco em love e waffles.

frase_original: The next three hours went by in a mind-numbing haze. By the time the cab pulled up to the airport terminal, she was pissed. Not at him though. She wanted to be-she'd fallen back in love with him, and he couldn't even stick around to have a waffle and say good-bye?-but she couldn't.
